guidance: Adding SG-4 & SG-5 furnaces (+600 TPD), commissioning Dec-2026 → 1,600 TPD.
Targeting 30-33% EBITDA margin; ₹750 cr fundraise approved.
Setting up a new Rooftop Solar Solutions division.
insights: Solar-glass capacity 1,000 TPD (~6.5 GW); Q4 India solar-glass EBITDA margin 33%.
Q4 consolidated PAT ₹169 cr (turnaround); revenue ₹440 cr (+18% YoY).
FY26 standalone revenue ₹1,535 cr (+38%), EBITDA ₹492 cr (+172% YoY).
Anti-dumping duty on China/Vietnam glass curbed imports, lifted pricing.
concall.orderExecution: Germany (GMB & Geosphere) deconsolidated post-insolvency (₹213 cr FY26 exceptional); FY26 ended in a consolidated net loss despite the strong India business.
concall.source: Q4 FY26 earnings call (Free Press Journal / SaurEnergy)
